5) activities: 'Zoo on June 17, 2024 (€80 total); Cycling Adventure on June 18, 2024 (€100 total)' — includes activity names, dates, and costs — fully specified.

7) total_budget: 'Total cost: €1,660 (Flights: €1,000; Accommodation: €500; Activities: €180; Dining: €80)' — includes total and breakdown — fully specified. All 7 items are present and fully detailed.
